src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the JHipster generated annotation to reflect the new generator version.
Remove unnecessary empty braces from the annotation interface definition.
Update import path for LiquibaseProperties to match Spring Boot 3.2+ package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.liquibase.LiquibaseProperties was moved to org.springframework.boot.liquibase.autoconfigure in Spring Boot 3.2, causing a compile error if the old import is used.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Exclude H2ConsoleAutoConfiguration from Spring Boot auto-configuration.

Update logger field references from 'log' to 'LOG' throughout the class.

Extract application name into a local variable for cleaner logging statement.

Reformat Optional chain for contextPath determination to improve readability.
Reformat text block indentation in log.info statement to align with standard conventions.
Refactor string concatenation in AspectJ pointcut definitions to use consistent indentation and line breaks.
Refactor string concatenation in AspectJ pointcut definitions for application packages to use consistent indentation.
Reformat logger error call in development profile to use single-line method invocation style.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:

                .error(

                );
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:

                "Exception in {}() with cause = '{}' and exception = '{}'",

                e.getMessage(),

Replace explicit Logger type declaration with var to utilize local variable type inference.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor logger instance to follow standard naming conventions (static final LOG).
Update logger usage to match the new static final LOG variable name.
Replace explicit type declaration with var for local variable.
Replace deprecated ILoggingEvent.getMarker() with getMarkerList() to comply with SLF4J API changes in newer versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: ILoggingEvent.getMarker() is deprecated and may be removed or behave differently in newer SLF4J versions compatible with JDK 21; using getMarkerList() ensures compatibility with the current API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
List<Marker> markers = event.getMarkerList();
if ((markers != null && !markers.isEmpty() && markers.get(0).contains(CRLF_SAFE_MARKER)) || isLoggerSafe(event))

Update import for JCacheManagerCustomizer to the new Spring Boot 3 package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.cache.JCacheManagerCustomizer was removed in Spring Boot 3; using the old import causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import for HibernatePropertiesCustomizer to the new Spring Boot 3 package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.orm.jpa.HibernatePropertiesCustomizer was removed in Spring Boot 3; using the old import causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The classes `DataSourceProperties`, `LiquibaseDataSource`, and `LiquibaseProperties` have moved from `org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure` to `org.springframework.boot.jdbc.autoconfigure` and `org.springframework.boot.liquibase.autoconfigure` respectively; using old paths causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated `Profiles.of()` with `matchesProfiles()` for profile checking.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method `Environment.acceptsProfiles(Profiles.of(...))` is deprecated or removed in newer Spring Framework versions; `matchesProfiles` is the required replacement.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor logger instance to use static final constant.
Add conditional logic for async vs sync Liquibase startup based on application properties.
Add null-safety checks for Liquibase contexts and label filters before setting them.
Update log statement to use the new static logger constant.
Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson imports to align with the new Jackson distribution used in the target JDK environment.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The package com.fasterxml.jackson is no longer available or compatible in the new dependency setup; using tools.jackson is required to resolve classpath errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the method signature to throw the new Jackson exception type instead of the old one.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: JsonProcessingException from com.fasterxml.jackson is not available; JacksonException from tools.jackson must be used to satisfy the throws clause.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declarations with var for local variables to modernize the code style.
